title: Saint Louis University’s New Venture Accelerator Names Third Cohort
summary_en: Saint Louis University’s New Venture Accelerator (NVA), launched in 2024 out of the Chaifetz Center for Entrepreneurship (CCE), announces its third cohort of participants. The NVA offers current SLU students and alumni who graduated within the last five years equity-free investments of up to $50,000 through a special accelerator fund supported by donors. title_cn: 圣路易斯大学新创企业加速器公布第三期入选团队名单

title: SLU Students, Alumnus Awarded NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
summary_en: Three Saint Louis University students and one recent alumnus have been awarded highly competitive National Science Foundation (NSF) Graduate Research Fellowship Programs (GRFP) for 2026. The fellowship recognizes outstanding academic achievement and the potential to make significant contributions to research and society.
title_cn: 圣路易斯大学在校学生及校友获评2026年度美国国家科学基金会研究生研究奖学金
